evidence: "This movie is a must watch for any horror fan and for the casual viewer, which is a real feat."
"This movie is a must watch for any horror fan and for the casual viewer, which is a real feat."
"Dahmer is not a run of the mill 'true crime' horror movie. This one digs deeper."
"This movie is a thrill ride that I never want to get off!"
"It is perfect. The stereotyped characters, the plot, and the dialogue are all perfect in their mockery without sacrificing the movie."
"The directors cut is completely different than the theatrical version."
"This director has done some amazing movies like 'May.'"
"If you dug this check out Mendez's 'Real Killers.'"
"I hope the creators are able to continue with this series."
"It has a sense of humor that hasn't been seen in horror movies since the 80's."
"It uses Halloween superstitions and practices as its basis which has never been explored in any other flick that I know of."
"It is almost chilling to see an actor bring so much depth to a character, especially Jeffery Dahmer."
"This movie is unique, creepy, and wonderfully cast..."

summary: The user has a strong preference for horror and thriller genres, appreciating complex narratives and fast pacing. They value high production quality and emotional depth in storytelling, often highlighting the impact of characters and unique concepts in their reviews.
